verses.text: “Israel mite tungah thu gen in la, amaute tung panin, beh khat ciangin ciangkhut khat, a beh tawh kizui-in a makaite khempeuh tung panin ciangkhut sawmlenih la in. A ciangkhut tungah amau' min ciat gelh in la
Levi ciangkhut tungah Aaron' min gelh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh beh lutang khatah ciangkhut khat hi ding hi
Tua ciangin kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna mai, nang tawh i kituahna munah tuate na koih ding hi
Keimah in ka teel mipa' ciangkhut hong sel ding hi. Amaute in nang hong phunsanna, Israel mite' phunna tua bangin kei' kiang panin ka beisak ding hi,” a ci hi

Moses in zong Israel mite tungah tua thu a gen hi. A makaite khempeuh in a beh tawh kizui-in makai khat ciangin khat pai, ciangkhut sawmlenih ama tungah pia uh a, Aaron' ciangkhut zong amau' ciangkhut lakah a om hi
Moses in thuciamna puanbuk sung Topa' mai-ah tua ciangkhutte a koih hi
A zing ciangin thuciamna puanbuk sungah Moses a pai leh, Levi-te beh-a' ding Aaron' ciangkhut selin nguumkhia a, paakin, almond min gah a gah hi
Tua ciangin Moses in Topa' mai panin Israel mite khempeuh kiangah ciangkhut khempeuh paikhiatpih hi. Amaute in en uh a, a ciangkhut ciat uh a la uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute si khading ahih manin, amaute in kei hong phunsanna beisak theihna dingin a lehdo mite-a' dingin lim ahi dingin thuciamna mai-ah Aaron' ciangkhut koihkik in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin Topa' sawl bangin Moses in zong a hih hi
Israel mite in Moses kiangah, “En in, kote a si ka hi ta uh a, kote khempeuh a mawkna ka hi ta uh hi
A nai-ah a pai, Topa' biakbuk nai-ah a pai peuhmah si ding hi. Kote khempeuh ka beina ding uh hita hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
